steps.title: Find the pronoun antecedent
steps.content: The blank starts a sentence about who created additional candy installations. The antecedent is Félix González-Torres, one person, so the pronoun must be singular and refer clearly to him.

steps.title: Reject plural or vague pronouns
steps.content: A and B are plural, and C implies exactly two things. The sentence needs a singular pronoun for González-Torres as the creator. The answer is D.
